name: @bpmn-react/core
description: Zero-dependency BPMN domain engine: model, lifecycle governance, validation, structured diff, hash-chained audit ledger, geometry and BPMN 2.0 XML (with DI).

scripts.build: tsc -p tsconfig.build.json && tsc -p tsconfig.cjs.json && node ../../scripts/write-cjs-package.mjs dist/cjs
